properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1 v6 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Stay in line, stay in line, My brother, stay in line Stay in line, stay in line My sister, stay in line

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Don't go to your left or to your right Just press on, stay in line Do not give up or turn around Press on, stay in line

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Though many had slipped away, Just look at the cross Just press on, stay in line All of our trials will be over soon, Press on, stay in line.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Prophet had told us, "Time be no more!" Press on, stay in line. The Lord will return And catch away His Bride, Press on, stay in line.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hallelujah, hallelujah hallelujah Hallelujah, hallelujah hallelujah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All Bride of Christ, stay in line
